~Set_output_views()
    { *ppviews_ = NULL; }

inline bool
  operator()(const File_read::Read_multiple_entry& rme1,
	     const File_read::Read_multiple_entry& rme2) const
  { return rme1.file_offset < rme2.file_offset; }
